data.body: 21dd completion RE-VERIFIED: verify-completion --source local (worktree HEAD a02752c03) = PASS, ALL criteria met (strengthened calibration_metrics stability assert + operator-attested live-eval + DD-3 no-src/rebar). Note: default 'verify-completion' uses --source attested which read a stale SHA (files absent) = false FAIL; the transition-close uses local HEAD (confirmed by 3863/2ad8/f698 closes). So 21dd will close cleanly once 750 Verified+1. Closed so far: 3863, 2ad8, f698. Waiting on 750/752 landers to re-green; then close 21dd -> close epic -> submit stack. 748/749 Verified+1 (unchanged patchsets).
